summary: Stale Phase-4E readonly-only lint assertions have been replaced with canary-aware equivalents that match the operator-authorized web3 reintegration. release-lint now exits 0 (54 PASS, 0 FAIL). Runtime audit remains blocked by transitive Solana advisories — see ahin-p2p-runtime-audit-triage.json.

replacedChecks.old: App Router page renders mock Gatekeeper and Matrix
replacedChecks.reason: MatrixReveal was retired when LifePaymentModule + AhinGateway became the post-Gatekeeper surface (commit ac19262).
replacedWith: Gatekeeper wires LifePaymentModule for live entry branch

replacedChecks.old: No wallet signing API exists in src
replacedChecks.reason: Wallet signing was added as the approved Path-B bridge in src/lib/walletAdapters.ts. The new check confines it to that single file.
replacedWith: Wallet signing API confined to src/lib/walletAdapters.ts

replacedChecks.old: Runtime Web3 dependency imports are absent
replacedChecks.reason: @solana/web3.js + @solana/spl-token were added in operator-authorized commit a9b0ae7 (Phase 1 reintegration). The new checks confine web3 imports to an approved set and keep /active-hash simulator web3-free.
replacedWith: Web3 imports confined to approved payment/transaction modules

replacedChecks.old: No Solana transfer instruction path exists in src
replacedChecks.reason: buildUsageFeeTransaction was added as the approved transfer-instruction builder in src/lib/transactionSolana.ts (commit 31af343). The new checks confine the builder to that file, forbid burn instructions everywhere, confine submission APIs to walletAdapters, and forbid Squads mutation libraries.
replacedWith: Transaction submission APIs confined to src/lib/walletAdapters.ts
No Squads multisig mutation libraries imported

replacedChecks.old: Protocol execution remains disabled / Phase 4E readonly-only
replacedChecks.reason: Replaced by defense-in-depth AND-of-env-flags + canary-defaults assertions that match the actual safety model.
replacedWith: Runtime defaults remain disarmed (defense-in-depth AND chain)
Canary configuration defaults to disarmed when env unset

nextStep: Operator decision required on audit triage (accepted-risk vs upstream resolution) before push or P3A advancement. No autonomous push.
blockers: npm audit transitive Solana advisories (bigint-buffer, uuid) — no clean fix
